This challenge affects me as a priest and all of us as Aaronic Priesthood bearers. This is a moral challenge and responsibility, and through our advancement in the priesthood we can learn to follow the right road and the right path to eternal salvation. Our responsibility as young men of this Church to keep ourselves on the right path and to gain eternal salvation is as important today as it was…
